codeReview.summary: Extraction of CSS Fundamentals (Module 3) and CSS Layout (Module 4) is complete and accurate. All required concepts are covered: selectors, box model, colors, display property, flexbox, positioning, and specificity. Content is cheatsheet-worthy with well-structured tables, code examples, and flash cards.

summary: CSS extraction feature passes review. The extracted content in .factory/library/extraction-module3-4.md comprehensively covers CSS Fundamentals (selectors, box model, colors, display, specificity) and CSS Layout (flexbox, positioning) with accurate code examples, reference tables, and flash cards. VAL-CHEAT-003 assertion is fulfilled.
